title: Grunwerg Windsor Tea Spoon Pack of 4 14 x 2.5 x 1 cm
features: CONTAINS: A set of 4 tea spoons - The perfect addition to any dining room setting
MATERIAL - High quality, highly polished stainless steel. Properties: dishwasher safe, dimensionally stable, hygienic, tasteless, acid-proof and indestructible

CLASSIC DESIGN - The cutlery has a timeless, elegant design and is equipped with ergonomically shaped handles that are comfortable and secure in the hand. Perfect for everyday wear, Windsor cutlery is particularly sturdy due to its high material thickness and fits on any table and every combination of decorations and porcelains
EASY CLEAN – All Windsor Carded Products are dishwasher safe, though hand washing is recommended for optimal quality maintenance
2 YEARS MANUFACTURER'S GUARANTEE against production errors
description: From the manufacturer Features Durable and hardwearing stainless steel Classic design Highly polished mirror finish Dishwasher safe. About Us Grunwerg is an supplier of houseware and catering products, dedicated to new product development and innovation. We specialise in premium stainless steel products and supply cutlery, teaware, serving ware, tableware, kitchen utensils, cookware, kitchen knives, barware, and scissors all representing exceptional value for money. Grunwerg has over 70 years of experience in developing new brands and ranges of well loved products. A family business since we started in 1945, we continue to evolve and change as tastes and styles have changed. Our customers vary from cookshops to some of the most premium department stores and large national retailers.
